ModMetaData.name: BattIePatch: Faction Choose Biomes Reimagined
ModMetaData.author: BattIeBear
ModMetaData.description:
V1.6
Reimagines the Faction Choose Biomes mod to allow for more overlap between factions, with rougher factions typically being in harsher areas, while more peaceful factions are in gentler biomes.
This mod also makes sure every faction is used, and adds compatibility for several popular mods including: - Faction - Elves - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Medieval 2
As well as all of my mods that add factions, including: - Vanilla Impid Reimagined
Important: This mod should be compatible with any mod that adds factions, they just will not have special rules and so can be found in any biome.
Have any suggestions for more mods to include? Let me know in the comments below!
